category_sources: Official SourceForge summary describes Mp3blaster as an interactive text-based audio player: https://sourceforge.net/projects/mp3blaster/
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains README, FAQ, and manpage files: https://github.com/stragulus/mp3blaster
Official SourceForge project links to the project website and describes the player: https://sourceforge.net/projects/mp3blaster/
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository description says 'The official repo of mp3blaster': https://github.com/stragulus/mp3blaster
tags_sources: Official SourceForge summary says it plays MP3, Ogg Vorbis, wav, and sid files and has a nested playlist editor: https://sourceforge.net/projects/mp3blaster/
source_facts.description identifies a text-based mp3 player
